title: OpenAI pushes AI agents and coding workflows forward
summary: AI assistants are becoming more capable at planning, coding, debugging, and working with tools across real software projects.

title: Anthropic advances long-context assistant experiences
summary: Long-context AI systems make it easier to analyze large codebases, documents, policies, and research material in one workflow.

title: Google DeepMind expands multimodal AI systems
summary: Modern AI models increasingly understand text, images, audio, video, and code inside unified product experiences.

title: Open-source AI keeps accelerating developer adoption
summary: Open models help teams experiment locally, fine-tune systems, and build private AI applications with more control.

title: Robotics and AI are converging
summary: Vision models, language models, and reinforcement learning are making robots better at perception, planning, and physical tasks.

title: AI regulation becomes a product requirement
summary: Teams building AI products need stronger privacy, security, evaluation, logging, and human oversight practices.
